rationale: Fifteen exact official MTA rows establish realized QBNR dates and one new current route identity per row. Each row has one bounded treatment member and therefore remains an atomic occurrence; predecessor, replacement, alternative, and timetable references remain treatment text or reviewed context only.

clauses.label: Q9 limited stops
clauses.source_quote: The Q9 will keep its current routing but make limited stops along Liberty Av and Sutphin Blvd.
For local service on Liberty Av, take the Q112 . For local service on Sutphin Blvd, take the Q41 or Q60 .
clauses.review_rationale: Source context, continuity, navigation, or another route reference; no treatment or route edge.
